evals.name: install-preview
evals.prompt: Enforce that no HPA in our fleet is pinned.
evals.expected_output: Runs `cub-autoscale preflight` then `cub-autoscale guardrails install` (dry-run) to show the autoscaler-not-pinned Trigger and which Spaces would be wired, before re-running with --commit.

evals.name: schema-check
evals.prompt: Make sure the ScaledObjects we generate pass schema validation.
evals.expected_output: Explains the schema-valid vet-schemas Trigger in the guardrails pack validates every mutation (including convert-keda output, keda.sh is in the catalog) and installs the pack.

evals.name: status
evals.prompt: Which autoscalers are flagged right now?
evals.expected_output: Runs `cub-autoscale guardrails status` and lists Units with autoscaling ApplyWarnings or ApplyGates.

evals.name: conservative-skip
evals.prompt: Wire the guardrails into every Space.
evals.expected_output: Notes install is conservative — it skips Spaces that already select Triggers their own way and reports them rather than clobbering, and that wiring those means adding the guardrail Filter to their existing selector.
